text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's been in something of a slump
lately, so we've come to a shrine together.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've been reading up on proper etiquette so I
don't disrespect the gods!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready, Trainer? First, when you approach
the shrine, you've gotta...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wait... Where do you walk again?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Do you hold the ladle... the same way you hold
chopsticks? Or was it a rice bowl?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I know this part! You're supposed to ring the
bell 108 times when you pray!
choice_data_list:
I'm pretty sure you bow twice, clap twice, and
bow again...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! I can't get anything right! I even slept with
the etiquette book under my pillow!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The gods must be so fed up...
choice_data_list: I'm sure they can see how hard you're trying.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, if nothing else, I'm confident that no one
else cares more than I do!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
O gods! Please accept the passion behind my
prayers!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I've done all that I can! All that's left is to
do my best!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! My body feels really light all of a
sudden! This must be a blessing!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I should go back and say thanks! I'll study up on
the etiquette right outside the shrine too so I
don't forget what to do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Bamboo Memory makes a smooth
recovery.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Where'd all this rain come from! Is it
because I was rude?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Bamboo Memory's prayers go
unheard, and she isn't able to fully recover.
